entry.value:
{"agentExecutionMode":"manual","isPanelCollapsed":true,"displayedAnnouncements":[],"conversations":{"198ea917-3ece-4074-85f6-8bef166f1dad":{"id":"198ea917-3ece-4074-85f6-8bef166f1dad","createdAtIso":"2026-03-04T01:18:15.951Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2026-03-04T01:18:15.951Z","chatHistory":[],"feedbackStates":{},"toolUseStates":{},"draftExchange":{"request_message":"","rich_text_json_repr":{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph"}]},"mentioned_items":[],"status":"draft"},"selectedModelId":"claude-sonnet-4-6","requestIds":[],"isPinned":false,"isShareable":false,"extraData":{"isAgentConversation":true,"hasDirtyEdits":false},"personaType":0},"eb605a90-a7b8-4853-9ae3-5d68b4d8e4e6":{"id":"eb605a90-a7b8-4853-9ae3-5d68b4d8e4e6","name":"SOMS Java Project Code Review
","createdAtIso":"2026-03-04T01:18:16.391Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2026-03-04T01:43:48.141Z","chatHistory":[{"request_id":"e5c046be-c09f-440a-9f7e-e36459aa73cc","uuid":"6b053bae-68c2-41cf-9d90-e632f8b77088","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":0,"toTimestamp":1772587096398},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"f91643f7-5f93-4c56-94fe-94ced983a5b7","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:19:31.225Z","request_message":"here the SOMS project created as part of core java classess
topics covered for now till exceptions handlings

can you verify if there is any mistakes?
","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"a36db59c-b470-45a6-9ee6-15d51fad890b","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:19:35.698Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"4c72a69c-25f5-4a9a-8f21-3fbfd42124a4","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:19:39.463Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"b956504b-1e0b-4167-8233-6668bf1ab344","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:19:44.523Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"0119f7e4-826e-495b-a0cf-19579c857060","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:23:11.094Z","request_message":"No we can fix this later for now i want to integrate expcetions handlings concept
how to explain and where to integrate this project","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"52e313c1-5698-466a-8a68-80db58afc592","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:23:15.426Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"b158f104-b228-489e-a0cd-f0c855e94340","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:29:15.977Z","request_message":"why i need customer exceptions instead of using Exception class to thow","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"5fc1dc19-bc9e-4a7a-9b45-4d035f023716","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:31:39.191Z","request_message":"so we always use throws on business logic and handle them globally?","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"a6307649-4c8f-4c8a-bcc3-0b94008dd54d","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:34:27.731Z","request_message":"in processOrder method did you handled it correctly? or any issues?","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"f7490846-4c6d-40aa-843d-f13a4960e962","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:34:31.620Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"428e87f2-ff57-4f5a-921b-f8441bc8ce1e","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:37:29.516Z","request_message":"for customer expcetions when to extend RunTimeEception class when to use Expcetion","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"6f63743b-0717-4cb5-bda3-d1b739dec519","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:39:59.887Z","request_message":"from student perspective why do we need to seperste customer exceptions ?","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"d70e4b41-69ba-4f5e-aab3-eeb29c460f83","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:41:29.620Z","request_message":"yes ","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"3d387f5e-82a6-4bcf-92a5-ef761f94fc86","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:41:34.032Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"fcfde5e9-bc31-4a91-9c5e-ac6a5a213240","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:41:43.154Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"3172383f-0fe5-413f-b77a-acdb2e87614f","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:41:47.066Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"3a674475-7a83-4080-95a2-19f897ecf740","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:41:55.544Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"4e13c1ec-f13b-43ee-99bc-3f3febfe46d8","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:42:00.101Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"4269adb6-e01d-42b8-9b2d-ad2f4da5a980","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:42:06.149Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"10d4457e-a8d5-41c2-a011-76324af73472","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:42:11.361Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"024afe86-59eb-450b-9eb0-4dc13c44167b","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:42:16.324Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"b12200fb-5579-47af-a540-83f4321be2e3","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:42:20.936Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"08369d53-4d11-4109-b9bf-3d2ae59d3720","timestamp":"2026-03-04T01:42:31.167Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUu
